prose: TEMPO frontier-orbital analysis (HOMO–LUMO gap) — DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier standard, density-fit) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 2 (radical). Input geometry from user-supplied .xyz file. SCF converged in 12 cycles. HOMO = −6.3375 eV, LUMO = −2.4651 eV, gap = 3.8724 eV. No warnings. Integrity check passed.
